claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.horizontalSemantic: Native hr with its implicit separator role and horizontal orientation.
semantics.decorative: role=presentation and aria-hidden=true remove the visual line from the accessibility tree.

layout.horizontal: One semantic border-width token in the block axis and fluid inline size.
layout.vertical: One semantic border-width token in the inline axis and stretch within the parent.
layout.forcedColors: CanvasText provides a visible system-color line.

consumerResponsibilities: Choose semantic mode only when the separation conveys document or group structure.
Do not make Separator focusable or use it as an interactive splitter; use Resizable for that contract.
Ensure a vertical separator is placed in a parent that supplies meaningful block size.
